name: Georgia Country Ham
recipeInstructions:
1. Have the hock cut off the ham so that it will fit into a roaster.
2. Soak the ham overnight in cold water and scrub the ham with a stiff brush. Change the water a couple of times to get rid of the excess salt.
3. Mix together the brown sugar, bourbon or sherry, and water.
4. Press the mixture into the fat on the ham.
5. Cover tightly with foil in the roaster.
6. Bake at 200 degrees for 8 hours.
